limitations: ai_investment_intensity: No AI-specific dollar amounts or named AI programs disclosed; automation references are generic and not explicitly tied to AI/ML. Score reflects aspirational/generic framing only.

ai_narrative_concreteness: Automation initiatives are named but not described as AI-driven; no deployment status or metrics provided. 'AI' in the business section refers to avian influenza, not artificial intelligence.

ai_risk_disclosure_depth: Risk-section material is present and names AI as a technology risk category with a specific mechanism (new vulnerabilities, cyber attack vectors), but no quantification or named governance/mitigation program beyond general cybersecurity measures.
